---
title: High-performance Julia
description: A course on high-performance research computing and parallel &nbsp;[![](img/logo_julia.png){width="1.6em"}](https://julialang.org/)
title-block-banner: true
---

<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "LearningResource",
  "name": "High-performance Julia",
  "description": "This course is an introduction to using Julia on the Alliance supercomputers.",
  "url": "https://mint.westdri.ca/julia/top_hpc",
  "learningResourceType": "course",
  "inLanguage": "en",
  "license": "https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/",
  "provider": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "SFU Research Computing Group",
  },
  ""keywords": "course, Julia, HPC, multi-threading, distributed computing",
  "author": {
    "@type": "Person",
    "name": "Marie-Hélène Burle"
  }
}
</script>
